content:
Hi, I’m Taki.

With the upcoming 2.5 anniversary and the Song of Saya collab, we’ll probably see a lot of new players, so I put together this infographic with tier rankings and dupe recommendations.

To keep it clean, I only labeled roles for characters with more defined playstyles instead of cluttering the chart.

Since the Morimens community is growing, I also made an English version this time so more players can use it. Apologies if any terminology feels off!

If this helps, I’ll try to make more quick reference charts in the future.

https://forum.gamer.com.tw/C.php?bsn=78829&snA=1336&tnum=1

embeds.title: 【一圖流】星辰篇 全限定角色強度榜 & 啟靈推薦 ...
embeds.description: ➝ 原畫質圖片 總算完成了！ 考量到接下來幾個月會有 2.5 週年與沙耶聯動，預期會有不少新玩家加入，因此特地整理了這張包含「強度」與「啟靈推薦」的一圖流。 為了避免資訊過於分散、影響閱讀效率，這次只針對幾位定位明確且關鍵的角色進行標註，讓大...

content: Fixed helot line map, moved it up a tier.

Arachne update is gonna take a bit of time, hit some unfortunate roadblocks on the automated tools that were supposed to make this process easy and painless…. Xd

I’ll probably have her skills and such added tonight, including use in the builder/collection etc.

The wheels I’m not sure, maybe tonight maybe tomorrow C:
